items.title: AI Could Boost Poland’s Economy by 12% by 2035, World Bank Says

items.title: The founder conference built for growth: TechCrunch Founder Summit pass rates increase June 26
items.description: Save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 by June 26, 11:59 p.m. PT. Designed for founders first on November 4 in Boston. Register here.

items.title: SpaceX Bankers Kick Off Marketing for Debut High-Grade Bond Sale
items.description: SpaceX is selling investment-grade bonds for the first time in what’s expected to be the start of a massive borrowing spree to fund the company’s AI ambitions following its record $75 billion IPO.

items.summary: 2026年全球机器人创企已融资188亿美元，超过2025年全年150亿美元和2021年峰值141亿美元。这表明机器人领域投资热度持续攀升，对AI产品经理而言，这可能预示着AI与机器人结合的新服务场景和商业化机会。

items.title: Microsoft and Chevron Sign 20-Year Power Deal For Texas Data Center
items.description: Chevron Corp. signed a 20-year deal with Microsoft Corp. to provide natural-gas fired power for a proposed West Texas data center, which could be one of the biggest in the US.

items.title: European Investor Seedcamp Closes On $320M Across Two Funds To Back Seed Startups And Reaches $1B AUM
